notes: v7.0 precision scraper focuses on IKEA US/UK, John Lewis, Dunelm, West Elm US, and CB2 US.
IKEA dimensions are extracted from embedded structured product data first, then official Measurements/Product information sections.
Generic full-page dimension parsing is avoided by default to reduce 1200 mm -> 1200 cm style errors.
width and length are top-down footprint dimensions in centimetres; height is stored separately.
Product images are resolved after dimension parsing by reopening the product page and reading the primary product image DOM container, storing the remote image URL by default.
Corner/sectional furniture is exported as a rectangular external bounding box unless manually edited later.
